reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlas-style tile extraction for bevy_ecs_tilemap and map tile indices to material tags in a FrictionSurfaceLegend resource.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_friction_tilekit_16px.png through AssetServer before spawning the tilemap chunk.
runtime_notes: Material tags drive friction coefficients 1.0, 0.5, 0.1, and 0.8 without reading pixels at runtime.
Tile pivots align to the 16x16 grid and never use sub-pixel offsets.
Vent grille markers share the atlas so hazard placement and world styling stay coherent.

context.usage: Tile atlas for stone wall drag, slick floor acceleration, moss floor moderation, safe ledge, and vent grille markers.

shape.silhouette: Compact 16x16 tile atlas with five material reads: rough wall, slick floor, moss floor, safe ledge, and vent grille.

acceptance_criteria: PNG bounds are exactly 96x32 px and divide cleanly into 16x16 tiles.
Stone, slick, moss, ledge, and vent materials remain visually distinct at a 4x nearest-neighbor scale.
The vent grille tile keeps at least four open slats so airflow sources remain readable.
